allow: Bash(python -c 'from PIL import Image; import os *)

PowerShell($names = @\('Before 1.jpg','After 2.jpg','Home Page - Hero Section.jpg'\); Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach\($n in $names\){ $p = Join-Path 'public\\photos\\New Photos' $n; if\(Test-Path $p\){ $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\(Resolve-Path $p\)\); "$n  $\($img.Width\)x$\($img.Height\)"; $img.Dispose\(\) } })

PowerShell($shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $folder = $shell.Namespace\('E:\\GitHub\\cobra-plumbing\\public\\photos\\New Photos'\); $f = $folder.ParseName\('Blow Torch Clip.mp4'\); for\($i=0; $i -lt 320; $i++\){ $name = $folder.GetDetailsOf\($null, $i\); $val = $folder.GetDetailsOf\($f, $i\); if\($val -and \($name -match 'dimen|height|width|frame'\)\){ "{0,-30} {1}" -f $name, $val } })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $base = "E:\\GitHub\\cobra-plumbing\\public\\photos\\New Photos"; foreach \($f in @\("Rough Job.jpg","Clean Work Example.jpg","Complex Work.jpg"\)\) { $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("$base\\$f"\); "{0}: {1}x{2}" -f $f, $img.Width, $img.Height; $img.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell($f = "E:\\GitHub\\cobra-plumbing\\public\\photos\\New Photos\\Blow Torch Clip.mp4"; \(Get-Item $f\).Length; $shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $folder = $shell.Namespace\(\(Split-Path $f\)\); $file = $folder.ParseName\(\(Split-Path $f -Leaf\)\); for \($i=0; $i -lt 320; $i++\) { $name = $folder.GetDetailsOf\($null, $i\); $val = $folder.GetDetailsOf\($file, $i\); if \($val -and \($name -match 'dimension|frame|width|height|aspect'\)\) { "$i `t$name`: $val" } })
